race.description: Tamworth United Rugby League 40 Year Reunion Mdn Plate
race.comment: EPHEMERAL (9) is a maiden galloper who hasn't raced since finishing in the placings over 1100m at Dubbo a year ago. Fitter for a recent trial win. Expected to feature. NORTHERN EAGLE (3) is a 10-start maiden who could only manage to finish tenth at his latest appearance over 1250m at Gunnedah. Rates highly in this field and can turn things around. DAISY DUCK (8) hit the frame two starts ago at Mudgee but ran below par last time when eighth and beaten 6 lengths over 1400m at Gunnedah after being in contention on the corner. Has the class to take this out. SIDE QUEST (12) has been freshened since finishing sixth over 1000m at Gosford. Filled a placing in a recent Tamworth trial. Worth including in calculations.
